name: Mission 1 – First Steps
description: Walk straight to the flag. Just use Forward – no turns needed!

name: Mission 2 – Watch the Flames
description: Same path, but there is fire on the way! Can you cross without getting burned?

name: Mission 3 – Coin Run
description: Collect both coins before you reach the flag. The flag stays locked until you do!

name: Mission 4 – The Staircase
description: Use a While loop with more than one block inside to climb the stairs and reach the flag!

name: Mission 5 – The Left Turn
description: The camel can only turn right. Use a While loop inside another While loop to make it turn left!

name: Mission 6 – Danger!
description: Fire blocks the path! Use an If block inside your While loop to check for danger before you step.

name: Mission 7 – Crossing!
description: Fire and walls block the way! Use If, Else If, and Else to check for fire first, then walls, before you move.

name: Mission 8 – The Spiral of Fire
description: The ultimate desert challenge! Combine While, If, Else If, and Else to survive the burning spiral.

name: Mission 9 – The Shortcut
description: Collect all coins, then reach the flag. Fewest steps wins! Can you find the faster way back?
